description: Integrate a CSV file containing JSON audio features into the Chinook database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db. Create a table named TrackFeatures with columns TrackId (INTEGER, Primary Key) and Features (TEXT), then import the data from /home/ga/Documents/imports/track_features.csv (pipe-delimited, no quoting). Create a view named v_TrackExtended that joins the tracks table with TrackFeatures to expose TrackId, Name, Composer, and the JSON-extracted fields BPM, Key, and Danceability. Export a CSV report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/high_energy_tracks.csv containing tracks where BPM > 130 and Danceability > 0.7, including the columns Name, BPM, and Danceability. Save all SQL scripts to /home/ga/Documents/scripts/json_analysis.sql.
